text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Taking first is Mejiro McQueen! What an extraordinary time! The star
of the Mejiros can do an incredible crawl!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she swam the whole thing without taking a single breath! Wooow,
that's some amazing lung capacity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew, now that was a result worthy of a Mejiro. That aside, the person you admire so much is performing quite admirably.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
And now for the second group. Maruzensky starts with the
breaststroke! But she's fast! Too fast! She's completely unrivaled!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Vroom, vroom! There's nothing like a good swim in the heat of
summer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I placed fifth... But there's still more to go! I'll definitely catch
up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah, hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaaah! Agh! I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's the final stage of the floating island race! The leaders have a
stunning sense of balance—oh no! We've got a fall! Can she still
recover?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oops! I'm almost there! I can take first at this rate—waaagh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Now's my chance! 'Scuse me!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Don't tightropes make you burst with tension? And if you
answer wrong, they shake the rope and throw you into the depths!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Question two! A mackerel is a fish. A dolphin is a mammal. Now, true
or false: a sea dragon is a fish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
True! They told me themselves a long time ago! There were five or six
in my elementary school class!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Don't you have a better trick question? I'm not falling for that junk...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The answer is... true! Will Nakayama Festa be able to keep her
balance?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Tch! Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the final event, the 3,000-meter super
freestyle—equipment allowed. Anything goes in this race! The best
equipment goes to whoever gets it first!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
That's not all! Blocking the competition is okay so long as it doesn't
violate the safety rules! The last race is sure to have tears of both
sadness and joy! Ready, aaand...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ Time to let this pool ride rip!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I'm going to make a comeback! "Breathe as the flying fish does"! Inhale... Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Look at 'em splashing with all that energy. Maybe it's about time I
take the lead!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ooohohoho! You can't stop Golshi the wave rider! Let's go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Agh! Cease your splashing at once!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(That girl, she does only as she pleases. Event or not, there are rules
one must follow.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The preliminaries come to a conclusion, but only eight participants
may proceed to the finals... Will Mejiro McQueen and her friends
make it?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And with that, here's to everyone advancing to the finals! ♪

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Cheeeers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Honeyade after a long day of fun sure tastes great!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you're advancing with all the fooling around you did.
You barely swam and finished last in the 200-meter freestyle.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Who could blame me? Swimming normal is such a snooze fest! You
shouldn't worry so much. Just do what you wanna do!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It just means you have the luck of the devil. But in the end, victory
will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's some mighty confidence, Nakayama! Guess I'll see you in the
final battle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! We can wear any swimsuit we want for the finals, right? This
year's big trend is "diving suit chic"! We better go helmet shopping!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! Honestly, would you stop getting carried away? You'll
be a burden to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For me as well... As a Mejiro, I must not overstep my bounds.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Still worried about that, huh.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, you're one tough opponent in the pool! You performed so
well in every match. It was fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you, Chiyo. We'll all have fun in the finals, too, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah, as much fun as we can!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I think that does it for training! Hehe, I think my accuracy's
gotten much better.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(The finals take place with eight contestants scattered around an
island, sneaking and sniping each other with water guns to win the
final round!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(I know now from the preliminaries. I can't beat the pros physically.
But if I sharpen my skills, I should be able to win!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Maybe there's a record of the old Splash Recs
somewhere. I'll try asking at the staff room later!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Heeheheee. ♪ I downloaded videos of all the previous finals!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, I can't resist starting with the one that Maruzen competed in
before. And... play!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I bet it was a fierce battle... I wonder how Maruzen won it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Whoa, what is this? No way!
